Dolenthol can be found before Barad Cúron, the Tower of the Crescent Moon, in the Circle of Death. You have rejoined Faramir's company. You should tal…
Faramir can be found outside Uialrond, the Dome of Evening in the Circle of Death. Dolenthol has asked you to speak to Faramir.
